title: Per-AI color coding for CDP bot decoration
desc: Each AI host gets a distinct DWM border + CSS overlay color. GetBotColors(label) helper picks from the existing label param in EnsureCdpReadyAsync: Claude=orange(255,120,30)/#ff781e, GPT=green(16,163,127)/#10A37F, Gemini=blue(66,133,244)/#4285F4. Also sets [host] title prefix on Chrome window; restores original title on guard exit.
steps: Add GetBotColors(string? label) static helper returning ((R,G,B), hex) tuple
EnsureCdpReadyAsync already receives label='Claude'/'ChatGPT'/'Gemini' — use it, no new param needed
SetBotTitlePrefixAsync(host): snapshot original title, prepend [host], skip if already prefixed (starts with '[')
GuardCdpFocusTheft: call _ = cdp.RestoreWindowTitleAsync() alongside SetDwmBorderColor(null) + SetBotOverlayAsync(false)
author: claude
